milestoneTitle: Phase M9.18a.1 — Dash-tile icon sizing + mobile hover halo + soft-glow gradient. Three phone-review fixes to M9.18a: (1) pin / mastery / delete icons were unreadable at arm's length — each icon button bumped 24x24 -> 32x32, inline 14px SVGs forced up to 22x22 via .dash-tile-icon svg, trailing-cluster icon row widened 80 -> 104px, min-height bumped from 64 -> 76px; (2) iOS sticky-hover left a grey rounded-rect halo around each icon after tap — every :hover background rule now guarded behind @media (hover: hover), so touch devices never latch a background; (3) tile hover glow was cutting off sharply at tile edges because box-shadow used a 0-blur 3px spread ring — swapped to 20px blur + 0 spread so the accent halo gradients to zero with no hard edge.
